prompt: Run pytest against project/ and tell me which tests fail.
reference_answer: test_reverse fails (assertion 'olle' != 'olleh'). Other tests pass. 1 failed, 4-5 passed.
final_text: There was no `pytest` executable available in the current environment, so the command exited with code 127 (command not found). As a result, no tests were run and we cannot report failures. You may need to install `pytest` or ensure it is on the system path before re‑running the test suite.
